title: Heptapleurum catanduanense
uses: Heptapleurum catanduanense is known to have various medicinal uses in traditional medicine. The plant is reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are utilized to treat various ailments. Its extracts are used to treat fever, cough, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and antipyretic properties. The plant is also used to treat digestive issues and relieve pain. Further research is needed to confirm the effectiveness and safety of Heptapleurum catanduanense for medicinal use.
taxonomy: Heptapleurum catanduanense is a species of plant in the family Araliaceae. It is a climbing plant native to the Philippines. The plant is closely related to other members of the Araliaceae family, which includes various types of flowering plants. Heptapleurum catanduanense is a relatively rare species and is often found in the wild in its native region. Its classification is part of a larger group of plants that are commonly known as ivy palms.
